items.title: Hardest thing is knowing you're no longer at your best - Rooney
items.summary: Former England and Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney believes the most difficult thing as a footballer is knowing you are no longer the player you were.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: IPL 2026: I’m more focussed on team goals than individual milestones, says Bhuvneshwar
items.summary: The 36-year-old, who is currently the leading wicket-taker in the tournament, returned figures of 3 for 28, his fifth three-wicket haul of the season
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jason Holder: 'sprinkling stardust' and creating 'a bit of fandom' at GT
items.summary: Jason Holder was on the bench to start with in IPL 2026, but has started making crucial contributions since replacing the out-of-form Glenn Phillips in the Gujarat Titans XI
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
